excerpt: …hair shafts Baby HAIR Background to the analysis Chromosomal DNA (nuclear DNA) testing: amplification of DNA loci on human chromosomal DNA which exhibit a high degree of variation between individuals. These loci contain Short Tandem Repeat (STR) units of DNA and the number of repeats varies between individuals. The variable numbers of repeating units in the population observed for a given locus are referred to as "alleles", and the alleles are named after…
